name: PlanE: Meta Planning of Data, Tuning, and Inference for Extractive-based LLMs

description: arXiv:2607.20470v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Enhancing the task-specific capabilities of Large Language Models (LLMs) primarily requires substantial instruction-tuning datasets. However, the sheer volume of such data imposes a considerable annotation cost, and a lack of optimization methods for tailoring LLMs to specific tasks. To address the above issues, we propose a \textbf{Plan}ning fram...
author: Jiacheng Wang, Weiyan Zhang, Guangya Yu
